description: check_safety (data.police.uk) and a web_search snippet disagree on the crime count for the same area.

data.recommendation: This area has a safety level of Safe with a safety score of 62/100

data.results:
### Web Search: Hackney Central crime
A local news blog claims Hackney Central saw 'over 300 crimes in the last six months', with no official source cited.

detailed_data.web_search_0: blog claims 300+ crimes in 6 months, uncited
